Paragraph.SourceString: Enter an optional password. This prevents anyone who does not have the password from entering your world.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Enter an optional password. This prevents anyone who does not have the password from entering your world.

Paragraph.SourceString: Please give your world a name. Limited to {CharacterLimit} characters. Spaces and special characters will be stripped out.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Please give your world a name. Limited to {CharacterLimit} characters. Spaces and special characters will be stripped out.

Paragraph.SourceString:
Hydration, Sustenance & Rest decrease faster and can reduce Health to 0%.
Enemy attacks deal more damage.
Enemies have more Health.
Weaknesses & Resistances affects are increased.
Skill XP beyond your current level is lost on death.
Only one gravestone may be active at a time. If you die with a gravestone active the oldest gravestone and all its contents will be lost.
Paragraph.LocalizedString:
Hydration, Sustenance & Rest decrease faster and can reduce Health to 0%.
Enemy attacks deal more damage.
Enemies have more Health.
Weaknesses & Resistances affects are increased.
Skill XP beyond your current level is lost on death.
Only one gravestone may be active at a time. If you die with a gravestone active the oldest gravestone and all its contents will be lost.

Paragraph.SourceString:
Hydration, Sustenance & Rest decrease faster and can reduce Health to 0%.
Enemy attacks deal more damage.
Enemies have more Health.
Weaknesses & Resistances affects are increased.
Skill XP beyond your current level is lost on death.
Only one gravestone may be active at a time. If you die with a gravestone active the oldest gravestone and all its contents will be lost.
Paragraph.LocalizedString:
Hydration, Sustenance & Rest decrease faster and can reduce Health to 0%.
Enemy attacks deal more damage.
Enemies have more Health.
Weaknesses & Resistances affects are increased.
Skill XP beyond your current level is lost on death.
Only one gravestone may be active at a time. If you die with a gravestone active the oldest gravestone and all its contents will be lost.

Paragraph.SourceString: Allow your friends to join your game.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Allow your friends to join your game.

Paragraph.SourceString:
Hydration, Sustenance & Rest decrease faster and can reduce Health to 0%.
Enemy attacks deal more damage.
Enemies have more Health.
Weaknesses & Resistances affects are increased.
Skill XP beyond your current level is lost on death.
Only one gravestone may be active at a time. If you die with a gravestone active the oldest gravestone and all its contents will be lost.
Paragraph.LocalizedString:
Hydration, Sustenance & Rest decrease faster and can reduce Health to 0%.
Enemy attacks deal more damage.
Enemies have more Health.
Weaknesses & Resistances affects are increased.
Skill XP beyond your current level is lost on death.
Only one gravestone may be active at a time. If you die with a gravestone active the oldest gravestone and all its contents will be lost.

Paragraph.SourceString:
Lack of Hydration, Sustenance & Rest never reduce Health below 1%.
All Skill XP is retained on death.
Inventory items are stored in a Gravestone on death.
Paragraph.LocalizedString:
Lack of Hydration, Sustenance & Rest never reduce Health below 1%.
All Skill XP is retained on death.
Inventory items are stored in a Gravestone on death.

Paragraph.SourceString: Allow everyone to join your game.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Allow everyone to join your game.

Paragraph.SourceString: Play by yourself. No one can join your game.
Paragraph.LocalizedString: Play by yourself. No one can join your game.
